markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 311. Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
##### § 311.072 — Prohibition of Grant by Charter

The charter of the municipality may not grant to a person a franchise described by Section 311.071 (Authority to Grant Franchise) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
